creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 245623
Screenshot

FreeBSD 14.0-RC1

ENV:
LANG=C.UTF-8
MM_CHARSET=UTF-8
TERM=xterm

PuTTY:
Window --> Translation --> Remove character set: UTF-8

How to reproduce:
bsddialog --msgbox plop 0 0

Workaround:
Enable Window --> Translation --> "Enable VT100 line drawing even in UTF-8 mode"
